mission.title: open-webui: feat: Support ollama's keep_alive request parameter
mission.description: feat: Support ollama's keep_alive request parameter. Requested by 10+ users.

steps.title: Check current open-webui deployment
steps.description:
Verify your open-webui version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui
helm list -n open-webui 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working open-webui installation.

steps.title: Review open-webui configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant open-webui configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui
kubectl get configmap -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=open-webui
```
Ollama unloads models after 5 minutes by default. A new parameter, `keep_alive`, allows the user to set a custom value.
It would be nice to have an option in the UI where a value for this parameter can be set.

steps.title: Apply the fix for feat: Support ollama's keep_alive request parameter
steps.description:
The change supports the new KeepAlive property from Ollama which keeps the model loaded for quicker response. https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/2146

The change includes

1. Adding a new Keep Alive in the Settings > Advanced.
2. The value being empty is default, in which case nothing is sent to chat/generate API
3. If the value is set then the value is fetched from settings and sent to ollama when calling chat/generate API as `keep_alive`

TODO:

Related issue #596

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n open-webui -l app.kubernetes.io/name=open-webui
kubectl get events -n open-webui --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "feat: Support ollama's keep_alive request parameter" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
The change supports the new KeepAlive property from Ollama which keeps the model loaded for quicker response. https://github.com/ollama/ollama/pull/2146

The change includes

1. Adding a new Keep Alive in the Settings > Advanced.
2. The value being empty is default, in which case nothing is sent to chat/generate API
3.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with open-webui installed or the issue environment reproducible.
